content.text: upload /Users/yusoofsh/Downloads/LogPro\ Mobile.html and fix the issue arise on the developer browser console

content.text: The HTML is a self-contained bundled artifact, so its console behavior depends on the unpacking bootstrap—not ordinary missing assets. The browser connection isn’t currently available; I’m checking the supported recovery path while continuing source-level diagnosis in parallel.

content.text: The target path is currently unused, so there’s no overwrite risk. Local Chrome renders the file without page-level JavaScript errors; I’m publishing it at its basename now, then I’ll reproduce against the actual public response because Cloudflare’s delivery headers and HTML handling are the remaining likely source of the console issue.

input.input: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"~/.scripts/leenk-static upload /Users/yusoofsh/Downloads/'LogPro Mobile.html'","workdir":"/Users/yusoofsh/Developer/Community/leenk","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

content.text: The public URL reproduces the real page error exactly: `Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'document')` at the end of the HTML. Local-file rendering stays clean, so the failure is delivery-context-specific. I’m narrowing whether it comes from Cloudflare HTML injection or from the bundle’s document-root replacement before patching.

input.input: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' /Users/yusoofsh/.agents/skills/ax/SKILL.md","workdir":"/Users/yusoofsh/Developer/Community/leenk","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"test ! -e /tmp/logpro-mobile-public.html && ax 'https://www.yusoofsh.id/static/LogPro%20Mobile.html' -o /tmp/logpro-mobile-public.html && cmp -l /Users/yusoofsh/Downloads/'LogPro Mobile.html' /tmp/logpro-mobile-public.html | head -20 || true && wc -l -c /tmp/logpro-mobile-public.html","workdir":"/Users/yusoofsh/Developer/Community/leenk","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"tail -c 1400 /tmp/logpro-mobile-public.html","workdir":"/Users/yusoofsh/Developer/Community/leenk","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":5000}); text(r.output)

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /Users/yusoofsh/Downloads/LogPro Mobile.html
@@
-    // Parse the template and swap the root element. Scripts inserted via
+    // Let other DOMContentLoaded listeners finish before replacing the root.
+    // Cloudflare may append a challenge iframe whose listener runs after this
+    // one; replacing the document first detaches it and makes contentDocument
+    // null, producing a console error on the public static host.
+    await new Promise(function(resolve) { setTimeout(resolve, 0); });
+
+    // Parse the template and swap the root element. Scripts inserted via
*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));

content.text:
Uploaded and fixed:

- Public: [LogPro Mobile](https://www.yusoofsh.id/static/LogPro%20Mobile.html)
- Local source: [LogPro Mobile.html](</Users/yusoofsh/Downloads/LogPro Mobile.html:163>)

Root cause: the bundle replaced the document root before Cloudflare’s injected challenge listener finished, causing `Cannot read properties of null (reading 'document')`. The replacement now waits one event-loop cycle.

Verified:

- Public response: HTTP 200, `text/html`
- Mobile UI renders correctly
- Original console error no longer occurs on the live URL
